Bracer of the Hidden  
 

Lore Item
Slot: WRIST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 6
Effect: See Invisible (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 10
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Bracer of the Hidden
Lore Item
Slot: WRIST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 6
Effect: See Invisible (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 10
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 6 gp 2 sp 3 cp
Tribute:74
Lucy Entry By:keltana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-19 22:40:18
Page Updated:Sun Nov 12th, 2017

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 9,750pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 22
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Lake of Ill Omen
NPC Name
a sarnak chancellor
a Sarnak legionnaire


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Lake of Ill Omen

Bracer of the Hidden item window 2016

Uploaded October 26th, 2016 by snailish
Updated November 12th, 2017

« Previous 1 2 3 4 Next »
Post Comment
it still drops in 2022
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2022 at 11:07 PM Rating: Decent
zelein
1 post
I had my monk parked at the chancellor spot for 2 weeks and would log into him before playing my other chars. I must have killed the chancellor 50 times it never dropped. I gave up with that approach and decided to start going after the legos and chancellor en masse. I cleared the fort over 10 times but eventually a lego dropped the bracer of the hidden for me. This can be a frustrating camp. I must have seen over 100 defiant bracers that dropped in the meantime. I had to double take to make sure the bracer of the hidden actually was the drop when it dropped.
▲ Page top
a sarnak chancellor
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2017 at 5:33 AM Rating: Good
CantabileAutotune
Scholar
32 posts
Drops from "a sarnak chancellor" - the PH for the Chancellor which they added on Agnarr (maybe on other servers too?) recently.

Also can confirm that you don't need to equip to cast the effect - can be clicked from inventory

Edited, Nov 7th 2017 6:38am by CantabileAutotune
____________________________
Sinbyen Jaggedglade
60 Druid of Agnarr

▲ Page top
dropped tonight on al'kabor - FINALLY
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2006 at 12:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362907835
View User Forum
36 posts
ok, after about a week of killing everything in the sarnak fortress this finally dropped off a sarnak lego. also picked up the 1hs, 2 axes, several hand woven shoulderpads, various gems, farsight crystal, iron bound tome, the bizarre 2hb with no stats... and some other vendor junk.

i didn't get an exact count, but i'd say i probably killed about 200 legionnaires before the bracer finally dropped. the only mobs i didn't touch were the chancellor and the imperial escort room with the weaponmaster?

don't give up! it'll drop - it just takes forever. ultra-rare.

Dropped

# Jan 01 2006 at 8:08 PM Rating: Decent

Was powerlevelling my Beastlord at Sarnak Fort on 31/12/05 when it dropped. No idea which mob dropped it since there was about 20 corpses on the ground at the time.

Still in game
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2004 at 1:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760212507
41 posts
Was waiting on Chancellor to pop for Prod...and just wiping throne room...dropped Bracer in about 30 min...was lucky, only the 2nd one I've seen drop in quite some time.

Was funny actually, was talking to a guildie about trying to get it, and dropped on that kill.

Just confirming still in game (c;

Edited, Tue Nov 2 01:38:55 2004
▲ Page top
Drop rate is horrible
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2004 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260865645
52 posts
I realize this is a rare drop, but I have spent the last 16 hours wiping this entire zone repeatedly. I'd say I killed well over 200 legionnaires without a single one of these dropping (Probably closer to 300). For those of you who got one in just one trip, consider yourself lucky. I'm giving up for now, maybe when I'm bored I'll come back again. Unless the item has been removed and no longer drops...either that or the person who says the drop rate is .2% was not lieing, which would mean it only drops 1 time out of every 500...which would prolly take close to a day and a half of solid farming to gaurantee yourself a drop 8^P. While I'm all for farming something you really want, this just seems a bit ridiculous.
▲ Page top
dropped, 1 hour camp
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2004 at 4:11 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591808186005
Scholar
69 posts
there's only one type of legionnaire in the zone. I stayed inside the fort near the main throne room. Cleared that room, and went around the wide hall leading to it, killing everything.

just wanted to pick up this piece. Yes you can target other players and give the the effect.

QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2003 at 1:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781595699
15 posts
Yo.

was slaying evrything inside the fort to get more of these to drop (Im a 56th troubadour) when I had 1 of these pop up on trak......but leading out thru the backdoor.

this happened about 2 or 3 times until a guildie joined me last nite (56th ranga) and SHE came across the same thing. when she tried to follow it it lead out of the fort.

now, my question is this: does the bracer drop off of a lego that pops OUTSIDE near FM zone??




Gabriiel, 56th troubadour on Quellious
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 21 2003 at 5:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WOW I got this baby off the leggos today! I only killed 8 sarnaks too. I was so excited- I was gaining faction with the local lizards then all the sudden I see this bracer on the mob - OMG COULD IT BE?! - YES! it was the bracer! I was very happy and I spent the whole day spamming my friends with it at the kael raid 8).
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 04 2003 at 1:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) settle down...or, you're just kidding, right!? right?
I needed to enter a subject...
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2003 at 1:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1709511381761
View User Forum
64 posts
people use instant cast items for 'crap' buffs before an 'epic' sized encounter (e.g. a dragon) that casts AE dispells. Circlet of shadow, Jboots, bracer of the hidden and goblin skull earring are just some items people pay A LOT of cash for, just for this reason.
When you get dispelled, it's nice to instant cast 4 or 5 things again to get ready for the next round of AE debuffs. ;)
▲ Page top
RE: I needed to enter a subject...
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2003 at 12:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764638499
8 posts
Actually bro. Circlet of Shadows would NOT be used as a junk buff...its invis, you'll pop out of it if you get hit by an AE and unless you're a cowardly lion, you'll probably engage the mob therefore you won't be invis anymore. Also, jboots isn't considered a "crap" buff because usually you'll have sow anyawys and if you're indoors, you're screwed. hence why guilds who have a 1 instant click item rule for u to join, it usually says other then jboots.

Bah Gobo earrings = P crap nub! 13 attack!!!
▲ Page top
RE: I needed to enter a subject...

20 posts
just to clarify...Circlet of Shadows is not insta-click, its 5 sec cast. Although Circlet of Shadow is insta-click

bracer is also good now for AE factioning in guk or MM for those who dont have buffs (war, rog, mnk, etc) and arent pulling the train to the AEer i used it to leech off other people AE trains for faction in MM
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 04 2003 at 1:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ya bro dude, getting this stuff and using it is soooo much easier than a shammy casting lev5 scale skin as a junk buff....you go dude bra
Got mine
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2003 at 8:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256048217
Scholar
24 posts
This still drops as of today. I am a 53 Ranger as of this moment, and the total time spent camping the Legos in the fort was perhaps 5 hours. A rough estimate of how many Legos I killed is maybe... 50? Might be more, one every 6 minutes sounds too long.

As far as the farming method goes, all I did was slaughter everything I saw, always keeping an eye on tracking, and made a beeline for any Legos that popped and took em down immedeately. To keep things interesting I'd put on all my damage shield spells that'd stack for a total of a 20hp damage shield, and aggro all the greenies in the Throne room. Hit points would fall to about 75% by the time it was clear, but there're a lot of mobs.

Legos spawn in the throne room as well as in the hallways. I had one spawn outside near an entrance.

Is there a difference between killing everything vs just killing Legos? I don't know. I can't say I ever saw one despawn either. A full fortress generally has 2-3 Legos.

Gaulven, 53 Ranger on Xegony
▲ Page top
RE: Got mine
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2003 at 1:51 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592758297215
38 posts
You got a good thing going on trying to get one of those bracers. The reason you kill everything when you are waiting on an item to drop is some spawns are random like %50 chance of X spawning 40% chance of Y and 10% chance of Z. Nobody usually know what spawns these are or cares to learn so they kill everything on the off chance they get one or two more Z to spawn. Also helps to keep you busy while camping an area.

QuoteReply

__DEL__1591771467331
3 posts
I got one of these from a roll in a group of lowbies in the sarnak fortress and I am tryin to sell it rite now on another 'puter and I want to know why people are willing to pay that much for it
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 15 2003 at 3:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) first off what server are you on if its a pvp this can be extremly useful seeing as how to pk a rogue you gotta see him and if he hides and sneaks he cen go bindwound and get a heal from someone all in all be an outright jerk granted its got no stas who cares you take off your hero or serpo or whatever you got click it swap back bam you are set i wished i had 2 of these one for my main and one for my ranger esp since he has a rogue he needs ta start pwning

# May 04 2003 at 11:57 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1671409140606
569 posts
phew I need a rest after reading that....Jack I would like to buy a period, comma, etc.... :p

▲ Page top
?
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2002 at 11:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781503741
142 posts
is this clickable from inventory slot or is it another MoD type item
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 29 2002 at 6:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The see invis is in effect when ever you equip it. I think this is how it goes so hope that helps if not coinfuses everyone.
RE: ?
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2002 at 1:26 PM Rating: Good
Cani
Scholar
46 posts
The see invis is *not* in effect just by wearing it.

The effect is a triggered effect, and a "must equip" to cast it and it's instacast.

So you need to put the bracer on, target self (or whoever you want to cast seeinvis on) and activate the bracer.

You cannot activate it from inventory. I have one, and I have tried, and it didn't work.
▲ Page top
cool!
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2002 at 4:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780771578
92 posts
nice spamming item, and really useful if you hate digging into your spellbook trying to look for see invis. this always helps when you need to go invis in a kos city or anything with someone and you want to do it quick and fast. fun to annoy people with though LOL

21 posts
got one of these while camping the chancellor for howling stones key quest, used it for junk buff for a while then accidentaly sold it to a vendor while cleaning out my bank

went to bazaar to see if there was one for sale and saw 6 ranging from 3000-6000pp!... ack im an idiot!

especially if you fight in Velks where the spiders invis themselves shortly after spawning and you don't wear a see invis item. # Aug 12 2002 at 6:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251138065

I have seen these in bazaar ranging in price from 3k to 12k. I remember this selling for around 1.5k or less before bazaar came. I think the lag in the zone mixed with the jumpy motion has made people insane. I love it.

# Aug 12 2002 at 6:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251138065
18 posts
Oh and I do know the true uses for this item. Crap buffs for dragon raids (or other raids where dispel magic is issue), and I leanred the hard way while in the Lake Rathe arena with those sneaky rogues (damn invis makes you lose target and they can sneak up and get first strike) Luckily i put back to wall, beat the crap out of rogue finally but i wish i had a SEE INVIS).
▲ Page top
RE: What is true price lately?
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2004 at 5:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791914349
115 posts
"Oh and I do know the true uses for this item. Crap buffs for dragon raids (or other raids where dispel magic is issue" Actually this is used for 1 more reason.It is very useful for rogues when sneak/hiding through a KoS city,you need to be able to see yourself in relation to other npcs/Pcs while hidden. This would be great for pretty much all classes that can use it but if i were camping this place for exp and we had a rogue in group i wouldn't roll.
